sources.title: Bigfoot | Full Movie | Action Adventure | Danny Bonaduce
sources.description:
Bigfoot - Two former musicians face off in the hunt for the legendary mountain creature.  Concert promoter Harley Henderson tracks down a Bigfoot, which causes an uproar in the middle of his concert, but an animal lover tries to stop him.
**Under license from The Asylum.  All rights reserved**
2012. Stars: Danny Bonaduce, Barry Williams, Bruce Davison

sources.title: Bigfoot Isn't The Only Monster In The Forest | Full Movie | Free Mystery Horror | Dawn Of The Beast
sources.description:
Aiming to see Bigfoot, a group of students venture deep into an area of the Northeastern wilderness known for its strange creature sightings. Soon, they learn that there is a much more sinister evil lurking in the woods, the Wendigo, and once the spirit knows you're there, they will come for you. Who will survive in a battle between the two most notorious monsters of the forest?

2021 | Stars: Adrián Burke, Ariella Mastroianni, Grant Schumacher
*Licensed from Uncork'd Entertainment. All rights reserved*
